title: Verify existing implementation of isTokenExpired
description: The isTokenExpired(token: string): boolean function already exists in src/auth/token-utils.ts and decodes JWT to check the exp claim. Tests are already implemented in src/auth/token-utils.test.ts covering valid tokens, expired tokens, invalid formats, malformed tokens, and tokens without exp claim.
existing_patterns: src/auth/jwt-service.ts - JwtService.signAccessToken and sign methods used in tests
src/auth/jwt-service.test.ts - pattern of using JwtService for token generation in tests
